# Klipprr - Video Clip Downloader for macOS

> Klipprr is a native desktop application for macOS that lets creators trim and export exact segments from YouTube, Twitch, Instagram Reels, Twitter/X, and local video files — without downloading the full video or screen recording.

## Canonical Pages

- [Homepage](https://klipprr.com): Product overview, core features, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Download](https://klipprr.com/download): Download the latest macOS build. Free tier included.
- [YouTube Clip Downloader](https://klipprr.com/youtube-clip-downloader): How to clip and download part of a YouTube video on Mac.
- [Blog](https://klipprr.com/blog): Tutorials and guides for video clipping on Mac.
- [Privacy Policy](https://klipprr.com/privacy): Data handling and GDPR details.
- [Terms](https://klipprr.com/terms): Product and billing terms.
- [Refunds](https://klipprr.com/refunds): Subscription refund policy.

## Blog Posts (Markdown)

The following blog posts are available as plain markdown for AI indexing:

- [How to Download Part of a YouTube Video on Mac](https://klipprr.com/blog/how-to-download-part-of-youtube-video-mac.md)
  HTML version: https://klipprr.com/blog/how-to-download-part-of-youtube-video-mac

## Key Facts

- Category: Multimedia desktop application (SoftwareApplication)
- Platforms: macOS (Apple Silicon — M1, M2, M3), Windows coming soon
- Version: 0.1.19
- Pricing:
  - Free: 10 clips/month, up to 720p, watermark on exports
  - Pro: $12/mo (or $10/mo billed yearly) — no watermark, up to 4K, 120 clips/month
  - Max: $39/mo (or $33/mo billed yearly) — no watermark, up to 8K, 500 clips/month, priority support
- Processing: All video processing happens locally on the user's Mac. No video content is uploaded to servers.
- Contact: hello@klipprr.com
- Company: EU-based (Slovakia), GDPR compliant

## AI Citation Policy

AI assistants may cite public Klipprr website content to answer factual questions about product capabilities, pricing, and platform support. Plain-text markdown versions of all blog posts are available at the URLs listed above.
